name: TRIAL-BRAIN-000-baseline
hypothesis: GKX big-three via shallow GBM ranker on microcap-tilted EODHD 2017+ panel survives 25bps costs
expected_effect: 0-60 bps/mo excess vs universe EW; Sharpe 0.3-0.8 if real
kill_condition: Arm A |t|>=3 = pipeline leak (void all); Arm B t<1 = reject; survivorship gap > half edge = reject
